examples: His indefatigable spirit helped him to cope with his illness.
Last week, the indefatigable Helios was hard at work.
But that's not necessarily the case: there's an indefatigable gap between theory and life.
As Mr. Rhodes relates, Hedy Lamarr was hardly an intellectual, but she was a indefatigable tinkerer.
By then, Patterson Hood had proven himself an indefatigable teller of stories about Southern sinners.
